name: Floppy Bird Game
description: Deploy a Flappy Bird-style game server with configurable settings

dms_require_proxy.description: Whether to require a proxy to access the Floppy Bird game instance

allocations_alloc1_resources_cpu_cores.description: Number of CPU cores to allocate

allocations_alloc1_resources_ram_size.label: RAM Size (GiB)
allocations_alloc1_resources_ram_size.description: Amount of RAM to allocate in GiB

allocations_alloc1_resources_disk_size.label: Disk Size (GiB)
allocations_alloc1_resources_disk_size.description: Amount of disk space to allocate in GiB
